commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Adama Adama and Seboim were two cities in the neighbourhood of Sodom, and underwent the like destruction. (Challoner)
God punishes, like a father, with regret.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Adama: Adama and Seboim were two cities in the neighbourhood of Sodom: and underwent the like destruction.
